julesThoughtProcess: I selected electric yellow (#FFEA00) as the base color for its piercing visibility and rebellious energy. It contrasts aggressively with deep blacks, evoking the visual signature of high-voltage data conduits and hazard warnings in a dystopian megacity, capturing the essence of a cyberpunk renegade.
storyPanel: A phantom glitch in the city's mainframe. They manifest only where the neon lights flicker and die, siphoning stray voltage to fuel their underground rig. A self-taught technomancer, they ride the bleeding edge of the datastream, leaving behind a signature trace of electric yellow static.
